title: eval_exists_test vacuous-true not commented
description: evaluator.rs eval_exists_test: when the form slice contains no Str or StringList forms (empty or only tags), the function returns true because the 'all listed headers must exist' loop never finds a missing header. This vacuous-true is correct per RFC 5228 §5.7 but will surprise a contributor who expects false for an empty input. Add a comment before the for loop noting the vacuous-true behavior and citing RFC 5228 §5.7.
